full_text:
TLS project

Anniina-Hanna-Zhihan-Ada
11.03.25

What are Tertiary Lymphoid Structures?

Patterns in Tissue Architecture
Investigate distinct patterns or structural changes in tissue linked to TLS presence across diverse clinical and molecular profiles

Comparison of LAgg and TLS Regions
Analyze spatial and functional differences between TLSs and other LAgg-containing samples

Proteomic and Transcriptomic Insights
Examine tissue areas associated with LAgg or TLS (GC, T cell zone, stroma, tumor)

We aim to understand TLS structures and their development in ovarian cancer

TLSs are enriched in IDS omentum compared to other tissue sites

TLS

Lymphoid aggregates (Lagg)

Specific questions - TLS Biology

Why do some tumors fail to form TLSs? 
Role of tumor genetics
Influence of transcriptomics
Differences in TLS and GC Patterns:
TLSs are enriched in IDS samples, but in HRP patients, GCs are found already in PDS: is there something different in these tumors?
Milky Spots and TLS Development
What is the relationship between milky spots and TLS development?
Could milky spots be part of this process?

GANTT chart

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YgP1cMyUO5QVM6mvEocqfqgwpWnww8nOI4tHRer7qec/edit?usp=sharing

TLS Atlas

Histological Annotations
Data Analysis
Clinical Correlations
Hypothesis Generation

TLS Atlas - Our Cohort

Data available for WES/RNA sequencing of 206 patients.
Matilda successfully extracted clinical data for patients from S002-S204 (first batch).
Within this batch, 114 patients had HGSC (109) or high-grade endometrioid (6).

TLS Atlas - Our Cohort

TLS Atlas - Preliminary exploration

Immune aggregate presence varies across 
treatment-molecular profile groups

TLS Atlas - Preliminary exploration

Low-PFS IDS HRP patients did not develop GC, but were able to establish immune aggregates

Data location storage

L:\Projects\7_TLSproject\TLS_Atlas_work

\code: scripts for Data curation, flowcharts, table generation and plots
\25_10_selection: 
Qupath_proj_25_10: Ada’s annotations on a qupath project
Clinical_data_first_batch: Clinical data for all samples of iCAN batch 1
First_batch list- those samples that have been included in batch1
Annotations: summary of annotations extracted from QuPath
Full_sample_list (Excel with two tabs and details of those samples in batch 1 and 2)

The naming for the L-Drive files has been changed (eg. spaces have been replaced by “_”, so none of the paths are now working and they need to be replaced)

Data location storage

L:\Projects\7_TLSproject\IDS_sample_curation

All IDS samples from the cohort have been annotated by ada (similar structure to the priorly described one)
